scenarios.expected: Visitor submits website URL and email to queue a teaser report.
Public API returns queued status only and never returns full report data or report URL.
Requests fail when bot verification is missing and Turnstile secret is configured.
Requester receives the PDF teaser and Northvalley is copied.
Homepage explains the assessment in practical local-business language.
Assessment positioning references Cobb, Paulding, and Douglas counties.
Resend failures raise a logged follow-up failure.
Founder reviews PR preview before any main merge.
